
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `tbl_external_topology_api_log`;
CREATE TABLE `tbl_external_topology_api_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `url` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `request_method` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `request` text,
  `response` text,
  `created_date` datetime NOT NULL,
  `updated_date` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;
LOCK TABLES `tbl_external_topology_api_log` WRITE;
UNLOCK TABLES;


DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `tbl_external_topology_member_list`;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_external_topology_member_list` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `topology_name` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `topology_coverage` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `service_trnx_instance_id` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `topology_type` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `member_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `start_node_alias1` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `start_node_alias2` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `end_node_alias1` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `end_node_alias2` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `start_port_alias1` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `start_port_alias2` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `end_port_alias1` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `end_port_alias2` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `end_node_coverage` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `start_node_coverage` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_date` datetime NOT NULL,
  `updated_date` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `service_trnx_instance_id_XXX` (`service_trnx_instance_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=82 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `tbl_filter_reference`;

  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `sub_service_id` int NOT NULL,
  `ref_type_id` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_date` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_by` int NOT NULL,
  `updated_date` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00' ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=12127 DEFAULT CHARSET=latin1;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `tbl_ipv4_allocated_ips`;
CREATE TABLE `tbl_ipv4_allocated_ips` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `assignment_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'ID of the pool assignment',
  `device_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Device receiving the IP',
  `service_instance_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Service instance that requested the IP',
  `ip_address` varchar(45) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'The allocated IP address',
  `is_active` tinyint DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '1 if allocation is active',
  `created_date` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT 'Record creation timestamp',
  `updated_date` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Last update timestamp',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'User who created this record',
  `updated_by` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'User who last updated this record',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_assignment_id` (`assignment_id`),
  KEY `idx_device_service` (`device_id`,`service_instance_id`),
  KEY `idx_ip_address` (`ip_address`),
  KEY `idx_active_assignment` (`is_active`,`assignment_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1266 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='Individual allocated IP addresses with full audit trail';

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `tbl_ipv4_pool_assignment`;
CREATE TABLE `tbl_ipv4_pool_assignment` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `pool_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `service_instance_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `sub_ip_pool_id` int NOT NULL,
  `start_ip` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET latin1 COLLATE latin1_swedish_ci NOT NULL,
  `end_ip` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET latin1 COLLATE latin1_swedish_ci NOT NULL,
  `ip_count` int NOT NULL,
  `subnet` varchar(3) NOT NULL,
  `usable_ips` int NOT NULL,
  `total_ips` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  `network_ip` varchar(40) CHARACTER SET latin1 COLLATE latin1_swedish_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `broadcast_ip` varchar(40) CHARACTER SET latin1 COLLATE latin1_swedish_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `ip_pointer` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `device_id` int NOT NULL,
  `is_full` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `is_vacant` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `session_id` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_date` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_date` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=10284 DEFAULT CHARSET=latin1;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `tbl_ipv6_allocated_ips`;
CREATE TABLE `tbl_ipv6_allocated_ips` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `assignment_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'ID of the pool assignment',
  `device_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Device receiving the IPv6',
  `service_instance_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Service instance that requested the IPv6',
  `ip_address` varchar(150) NOT NULL COMMENT 'The allocated IPv6 address',
  `is_active` tinyint DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '1 if allocation is active',
  `created_date` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT 'Record creation timestamp',
  `updated_date` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Last update timestamp',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'User who created this record',
  `updated_by` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'User who last updated this record',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_assignment_id` (`assignment_id`),
  KEY `idx_device_service` (`device_id`,`service_instance_id`),
  KEY `idx_ip_address` (`ip_address`),
  KEY `idx_active_assignment` (`is_active`,`assignment_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=2 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `tbl_ipv6_device_pool_assignment`;
CREATE TABLE `tbl_ipv6_device_pool_assignment` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `device_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Device receiving the pool allocation',
  `ipv6_pool_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'ID of the IPv6 pool being assigned',
  `service_instance_id` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Service instance requesting the allocation',
  `service_type` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Service type (GI-BB, TDIA, etc)',
  `network_ip` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Network address (e.g., 2001:db8::)',
  `gateway_ip` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Gateway/first usable IPv6',
  `subnet_mask` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Subnet mask (e.g., ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff::)',
  `subnet_cidr` tinyint NOT NULL COMMENT 'CIDR notation (e.g., 64)',
  `total_usable_ips` bigint NOT NULL COMMENT 'Total usable IPs in this pool',
  `ip_pointer` bigint DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Current pointer position for next IP assignment',
  `is_pool_exhausted` tinyint DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '1 if all IPs are allocated',
  `created_date` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT 'Record creation timestamp',
  `updated_date` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Last update timestamp',
  `created_by` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'User who created this record',
  `updated_by` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'User who last updated this record',
  `is_active` tinyint DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '1 if record is active',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_device_pool` (`device_id`,`ipv6_pool_id`),
  KEY `idx_device_service` (`device_id`,`service_instance_id`),
  KEY `idx_pool_id` (`ipv6_pool_id`),
  KEY `idx_active_exhausted` (`is_active`,`is_pool_exhausted`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_device_pool_assignment_ipv6_pool` FOREIGN KEY (`ipv6_pool_id`) REFERENCES `tbl_ipv6_pool` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=2 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `tbl_isp_master`; 
CREATE TABLE `tbl_isp_master` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `isp_name` varchar(155) NOT NULL,
  `isp_code` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=22 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `tbl_isp_to_vlan_mapping`;
CREATE TABLE `tbl_isp_to_vlan_mapping` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `location_id` int NOT NULL,
  `isp_id` int NOT NULL,
  `service_vlan_id` int NOT NULL,
  `svlan` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `updated_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `isp_id_foreign_key` (`isp_id`),
  KEY `service_vlan_id` (`service_vlan_id`),
  KEY `location_id_foreign_key` (`location_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `isp_id_foreign_key` FOREIGN KEY (`isp_id`) REFERENCES `tbl_isp_master` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `location_id_foreign_key` FOREIGN KEY (`location_id`) REFERENCES `tbl_location_master` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `service_vlan_id` FOREIGN KEY (`service_vlan_id`) REFERENCES `tbl_service_vlan` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=86 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;

  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT 'Primary Key',
  `provisionlsp_id` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `url` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `request_method` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `request` blob,
  `response` longtext,
  `log_details` longtext,
  `log_file_path` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Log saved in this file',

  `created_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=latin1;

) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=19 DEFAULT CHARSET=latin1;

  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `order_type` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `provider` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,

  `rt_client` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `rt_server` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `rt_vpnname` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `rt_vpntopology` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,

  `rt_status` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `route_distinguisher` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `rd_pehostname` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `rd_vrfname` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,

  `soo_linked_serviceid1` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `soo_linked_serviceid2` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `soo_routingprotocol` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `soo_status` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_by` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_date` datetime NOT NULL,
  `updated_date` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `service_trnx_instance_id_XXX` (`service_trnx_instance_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=33 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

  `identifier` varchar(20) NOT NULL,

  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',

) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=17 DEFAULT CHARSET=latin1;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `tbl_orders`;
CREATE TABLE `tbl_orders` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `hostname` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `sitn_id` int NOT NULL,
  `interface_name` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `type` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `status` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  `sub_status` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `request` text NOT NULL,
  `dryrun_response` longtext,
  `link_type` varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL,
  `customer_facing` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_on` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_on` datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=latin1;


LOCK TABLES `tbl_orders` WRITE; 
UNLOCK TABLES;

  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,

  `pon_port` tinyint NOT NULL,

  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `updated_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=27 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;
